Argument.Name: URL
Argument.Description: A URL used to populate options from a single value: [[protocol]]://[[user]]:[[password]]@[[host]]/[[path?]]

Option.Description: The remote hostname for a network credential. This can include the port number.
The path with which the credential will be used. E.g., for accessing a remote https repository, this will be the repository's path on the server.
The protocol over which the credential will be used (e.g., https).

Argument.Name: URL
Argument.Description: A URL used to populate options from a single value: [[protocol]]://[[user]]:[[password]]@[[host]]/[[path?]]

Option.Description: The remote hostname for a network credential. This can include the port number.
The path with which the credential will be used. E.g., for accessing a remote https repository, this will be the repository's path on the server.
The protocol over which the credential will be used (e.g., https).

Argument.Name: URL
Argument.Description: A URL used to populate options from a single value: [[protocol]]://[[user]]:[[password]]@[[host]]/[[path?]]

Option.Description: The remote hostname for a network credential. This can include the port number.
The path with which the credential will be used. E.g., for accessing a remote https repository, this will be the repository's path on the server.
The protocol over which the credential will be used (e.g., https).
